MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Glen R. Powell, Esq. of GORDON & REES (415-986-5900), appearing for defendant / moving party Air & Liquid Systems Corp., Successor by Merger to Buffalo Pumps
James P. Nevin, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Gary Horsman

RULING:
Defendant Air & Liquid Systems Corp., Successor by Merger to Buffalo Pumps' motion for summary judgment. Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternative motion for summary adjudication is denied as to issues 1 (negligence) and 2 (strict liability). Plaintiff presented evidence creating a triable issue whether he was exposed to asbestos-containing gaskets attributable to defendant. Defendant's objections to Mr. Horsman's declaration are overruled. Plaintiff concedes the lack of merit of his false representation claim. Defendant satisfied its burden of production and plaintiff did not present clear and convincing evidence that defendant acted with malice, fraud or oppression. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)
